title: Bosch 2608597656 CYL-3 Concrete Drill Bit, 4mm x 40mm x 75mm, Silver
features: As a leading manufacturer for power tools accessories, Bosch offers the ideal accessories for virtually all applications.
It is our aim to develop appropriate accessories for more efficient working.
The research and development departments at Bosch work to develop and optimize accessories in line with the needs of users
description: Product Description Bosch is a leading manufacturer of accessories for power tools and is an innovation leader with 125 years of tradition. Bosch's aim is to develop innovative accessories for all applications, for more efficient working and for new materials. With more than 8000 products, Bosch offers the appropriate accessories for virtually all applications, users and all brands of power tools. Suitable for drilling holes in concrete, masonry, limestone, natural and artificial stone;Hammer resistant heavy duty drill bit, manufactured to ISO 5468, for all impact drills;Suitable for drilling holes for fixings;Drill bit colour: silver-grey, sand-blasted Box Contains 1 x CYL-3 concrete drill bit
